solutions.name: Generic CI/CD sample
solutions.notes: Typically provides one pipeline example but limited governance tooling or adoption material.

solutions.name: Best-practice deck
solutions.notes: Good for alignment, but usually not executable or measurable.

solutions.name: Internal accelerator
solutions.notes: Often strong in one platform or team context, but less portable across platforms and adoption motions.

solutions.name: Enterprise BI DevOps with Microsoft Fabric
solutions.notes: Combines platform-neutral CI/CD, PBIP validation, quality gates, no-code tools, release readiness, adoption material, and maturity tracking.
